name: A 20-minute Chicken Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 4 Boneless and skinless chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Using the palm of your hand, flatten the chicken to an even thickness.
2. Dip the chicken into the egg, then coat with breadcrumbs.
3. In a skillet over medium heat, brown the chicken on both sides in hot margarine.
4. Add spaghetti sauce and reduce heat. Cover; simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with cheeses and parsley. Cover; simmer for an additional 5 minutes or until cheese melts.
6. Makes 4 servings.
